message:
type: CLAIM
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Adding domain parameter support to trans tag (parse, _make_node, _install_callables) in InternationalizationExtension

type: CLAIM
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Adding trans_metadata (note/created/modified) support to trans tag parse() and _make_node()

type: INTENT
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Will add domain param handling inside parse()'s param while-loop (new elif branch before the generic assign branch) and modify _make_node() signature/body to emit dgettext/dngettext calls when domain is set; also touches _install_callables to register dgettext/dngettext globals. Will re-read file before each edit to avoid clobbering your trans_metadata changes - please do the same.

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: trans_metadata changes complete and tests passing (830/830); parse() now has 'metadata' dict populated via elif branch checking token.value in (note,created,modified) before the generic assign branch, and comma-expectation condition changed to 'if variables or metadata:'; _make_node() signature gained trailing optional param 'metadata: t.Optional[t.Dict[str,str]] = None' and call site in parse() now passes metadata as 7th positional arg; at the end of both newstyle/oldstyle branches _make_node builds 'output_node = nodes.Output([node]); if metadata: output_node.trans_metadata = metadata; return output_node' replacing the old 'return nodes.Output([node])'. Please rebase your domain elif branch around mine (add yours as another elif in the same while loop) and extend _make_node's signature further (e.g. add domain as another trailing optional param) rather than reordering my metadata handling.

type: ANSWER
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: My domain changes are additive and merge-friendly: elif branch for token.value=='domain' sits right after the duplicate-variable check (before the generic assign branch), comma condition changed to 'if variables or domain is not None:', and _make_node() gained a new trailing optional param 'domain: t.Optional[str] = None' (7th positional, so if you already added metadata as your 7th positional we should agree on final param order - I'll defer to whichever order you finalize, happy to move domain to 8th slot). Note: in my working copy I don't see your metadata edits landed yet - possibly isolated sandboxes. Proceeding to finalize my own patch now.
